# opnsense_kea_dhcpv6_subnet (Resource)

Manages a Kea DHCPv6 subnet on OPNsense. The subnet's interface must be enabled in the Kea DHCPv6 general settings (`opnsense_kea_dhcpv6_settings`) first.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Interface this subnet is served on (must be enabled in the DHCPv6 general settings).
- `subnet` (String) Subnet in CIDR notation (e.g. `2001:db8::/64`).

### Optional

- `allocator` (String) Lease allocator strategy (empty = default, `iterative`, or `random`).
- `description` (String) Description of the subnet.
- `pd_allocator` (String) Prefix-delegation allocator strategy (empty = default, `iterative`, `random`, or `flq`).
- `pools` (String) Address pools for the subnet (newline-separated ranges).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the subnet.
